tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or very close to normal limits. Potassium is at the upper limit of normal, and total CO₂ is slightly below the reference range, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of acid-base status if clinically indicated.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Vecchio di Montebelluna
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
